name: White Chili
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup chicken, or turkey, diced, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak beans overnight or at least 4 hours. Drain.
2. Simmer the soaked beans in chicken broth with onion, garlic, and seasonings for 1 hour.
3. Add green chilies and cooked chicken; simmer another hour until beans are tender.
4. Serve with tortilla chips, sliced jalapeno peppers, Monterrey Jack cheese, ripe olives, salsa, and/or sour cream.
This dish won Grand Champion in a county-wide cooking contest.
